query: We're redesigning our onboarding flow and nobody agrees on what's broken. How do I set up a usability testing session with 5 users to get real data?
Je dois créer des personas pour notre produit B2B SaaS (outil RH, 3 types d'utilisateurs : DRH, manager, employé). On a 200 clients mais pas de données quali. Par où commencer?
Our checkout has a 68% abandonment rate. I want to run user interviews to understand why. How many users do I need and what questions should I ask?
Comment faciliter un Google Design Sprint en 5 jours avec une équipe de 6 personnes (2 devs, 1 designer, 1 PM, 1 CEO, 1 client)? On part de zéro sur un nouveau produit.
I need to do a heuristic evaluation of our app before the next sprint. Can you walk me through Nielsen's 10 heuristics with examples relevant to a B2C e-commerce site?
On veut mesurer la qualité de l'expérience utilisateur de notre app mobile après le redesign. Quelle combinaison de métriques UX utiliser — SUS, NPS, UMUX-Lite?
I'm doing card sorting to reorganize our navigation (we have 47 menu items). Should I use open or closed card sorting, and what tools work well for remote sessions?
Notre équipe produit invente des features sans validation utilisateur. Comment mettre en place un processus de continuous discovery — 30 min/semaine de tests avec des users?
How do I recruit participants for usability testing of a niche B2B product (HR software for companies with 200+ employees)? We can't use UserTesting.com for this.
I need to build a new button component with hover and focus states. Should I use Radix UI primitives or build it from scratch with Tailwind?
How should I implement dark mode in our design system? We use design tokens and Figma Variables.
What's the best way to track user behavior in our React app — Mixpanel vs PostHog vs Amplitude? We have 50k MAU.
Notre taux de conversion sur la page pricing est de 2.3%. On veut tester un nouveau layout. Comment structurer un A/B test rigoureux?
How do I write a product requirements document (PRD) for a new feature? What sections should it include?
I want to add accessibility support to our component library — WCAG 2.2 AA compliance. Where do I start?
